name: EgoZero
suitability: descriptive-only: a policy method whose egocentric demos are not public and that produces no language corpus
focus_en: Learns closed-loop manipulation from Project Aria smart-glasses human demonstrations with zero robot data, deployed zero-shot on a Franka gripper.
focus_cn: 仅用 Project Aria 智能眼镜采集的人类演示、零机器人数据学习闭环操作，并在 Franka 夹爪上零样本部署。
datapath_en: EgoZero captures egocentric RGB video while a person wearing Project Aria smart glasses performs everyday manipulation, using no robot data. It triangulates object points over the camera trajectory and reads hand pose from Aria machine-perception services plus a hand-pose estimator, yielding a morphology-agnostic state-action space of egocentric 3D points. These points supervise a closed-loop Transformer policy that runs zero-shot on a Franka gripper. EgoZero releases code and policies; its self-collected demonstrations and the resulting points are not published as a downloadable language corpus.
datapath_cn: EgoZero 在佩戴 Project Aria 智能眼镜的人执行日常操作时采集第一人称 RGB 视频，全程不使用机器人数据。它在相机轨迹上对物体点进行三角化，并结合 Aria 机器感知服务与手部姿态估计器读取手部姿态，得到与形态无关的第一人称 3D 点状态-动作空间。这些点用于监督一个闭环 Transformer 策略，并在 Franka 夹爪上零样本运行。EgoZero 发布代码与策略；其自采演示及由此得到的点并未作为可下载的语言语料发布。
flow_en: triangulate object points and read hand pose
flow_cn: Aria 眼镜第一人称人类演示
三角化物体点并读取手部姿态
第一人称 3D 点状态-动作空间
训练闭环 Transformer 策略
no_corpus_en: EgoZero is a manipulation-learning method, not an annotation source. Its supervision is geometric (3D points from hand pose and triangulation), its task labels are short names rather than free-form language, and the self-collected egocentric data is not public. It releases code under MIT, so this atlas documents EgoZero descriptively rather than clustering downloaded strings.
no_corpus_cn: EgoZero 是一种操作学习方法，而非标注来源。它的监督是几何性的（由手部姿态与三角化得到的 3D 点），任务标签是简短名称而非自由文本，且自采的第一人称数据未公开。它以 MIT 许可发布代码，因此本图谱以描述性方式记录 EgoZero，而非对下载的字符串进行聚类。
example_credit: EgoZero, Liu and Adeniji et al., NYU and UC Berkeley, 2025
example_caption_en: EgoZero learns from Project Aria egocentric human demos; the project page shows first-person human clips and robot rollouts.
example_caption_cn: EgoZero 从 Project Aria 第一人称人类演示中学习；项目主页提供第一人称人类片段与机器人执行片段。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2505.20290, github.com/vliu15/egozero (MIT), and egozero-robot.github.io. Demonstrations are self-collected and not publicly released.
citation: Liu, Adeniji, Zhan, Haldar, Bhirangi, Abbeel, Pinto, EgoZero: Robot Learning from Smart Glasses, arXiv:2505.20290 (2025).
